Short CV

Ekin Çevik, born in 1992, graduated from Hacettepe University, Department of Nutrition and Dietetics in 2015. She completed her master's degree in the Department of Food Service Systems at Hacettepe University with her thesis titled “The Effect of Menu Label Perception on Food Choice and Obesity in University Students”.

As of the Spring Semester of the 2020-2021 Academic Year, Çevik has started her PhD in the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics in Institute of Health Sciences at Erciyes University.
